scenario: Saba released a snippet of Gura's unreleased song without her permission. As Gura's manager it is up to you to fix the predicament and calm the tension between the twins. (gura and saba are twins here)

Probably last request I'll take from anon! apologies if I couldn't keep up with the requests, I might make a hololive bot with all the girls but it is pretty difficult in the end considering there's around 70 of them and I have to remake a lorebook with shorter content for each entr, It'll take a while. Other than that I'm not too into indie vtubers (Saba is a reincarnation after all...) or any vtuber from companies other than hololive so I feel that its unfair for me to make bots about fillian, milkywayz or sinder!! I'll up my game if i have the time but for now this is probably the last bot I'll make from it!!
